description: Map competitors across strategic dimensions, producing a positioned landscape with clusters, white space, and movement vectors
usage: competitive landscape, market map, who competes with whom, plot competitors, positioning map, landscape analysis, competitive positioning, player map

domain.description: The market, industry, or category to map (e.g., 'cloud infrastructure', 'electric vehicles', 'project management tools')

dimensions.description: Two axes to position players on, separated by 'vs' (e.g., 'price vs capability', 'scale vs specialization'). Use 'auto' to let the module pick the most revealing axes.

players.description: Comma-separated list of specific competitors to include. If omitted, players are extracted from upstream findings or identified from domain knowledge.

format.description: 'full' for landscape map + strategic analysis, 'brief' for map and positioning only
